onboarding.footer: Paw Hub © {{year}} · Veterinary Clinic Management System

hero.titlePrefix: Tired of running your clinic with
hero.desc: Paw Hub brings medical records, queues, checkout, inventory, and business reports for your vet clinic into one place — so you spend more time with patients, not paperwork.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card needed. Set up yourself in ~5 minutes.

painPoints.title: If this still happens at your clinic...
painPoints.desc: It might be time for a change. Here's what usually shifts once a clinic moves to Paw Hub:

items.before: Patient records still on paper, takes 10 minutes to find every time
items.after: Just type a name or ID, the medical record shows up instantly

items.before: Vaccine reminders often missed, patients come back late
items.after: WhatsApp reminders run automatically, no need to remember manually

items.before: Medicine stock suddenly runs out right when it's busiest
items.after: Get notified the moment stock starts running low

items.before: Monthly cash and report recaps can take all night
items.after: Just open the dashboard, every number is already calculated

items.before: Phone keeps ringing for bookings, front desk overwhelmed
items.after: Pet owners book their own appointments from their phone

flagship.title: What clinics use the most
flagship.desc: Not a long feature list that overwhelms you — these three are the ones that make the biggest difference day to day.

items.title: Patient history, never lost again
items.desc: Every visit, diagnosis, and prescription is automatically saved to each pet's profile. A substitute vet can instantly understand the history without asking the owner from scratch.

items.title: Let pet owners manage their own schedule
items.desc: Share the booking link on Instagram or your clinic's WhatsApp. Once scheduled, reminders are sent automatically a day before — cutting down on empty slots and no-shows.

items.title: Know your clinic's condition without manual counting
items.desc: Daily revenue, visit trends, down to your best-selling services — all readable from one screen. No more opening Excel at the end of the month.

flagship.moreLabel: ...and there are a few more modules if your clinic needs them:

story.quote: We built Paw Hub because we kept seeing fellow vets stuck copying notes from paper to Excel every night, when that time could've gone to rest or the next patient instead. So we set out to build one place that handles the clinic's admin work, so the people at the exam table can focus on what actually needs them: caring for the animal.
story.author: The Paw Hub Team
story.authorNote: built while talking directly with small clinics

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.desc: Not template testimonials — this is what they actually said.

items.quote: I used to have to manually count the day's income every time I closed the register, sometimes until 9pm. Now I just open the dashboard and the numbers are already sorted out.
items.name: Dr. Sarah Amelia

items.quote: What I feel the most is the automatic WhatsApp reminder. Patients who used to be late for their vaccine boosters miss it far less often now.
items.name: Hendra Wijaya

items.quote: Online booking has drastically cut down incoming calls. Our front desk team can now focus more on the patients who walk in.
items.name: Dr. Rizky Pratama

howItWorks.title: Getting started is easy
howItWorks.desc: No multi-day training, no complicated installation.

steps.title: Register your clinic
steps.desc: Fill in your clinic name and create an admin account. Takes less than 5 minutes.

steps.title: Set up your services
steps.desc: Add branches, services, products, and your team to match your clinic.

steps.title: Start running
steps.desc: Take your first patient, the system helps remember the rest.

items.q: Can I really try it for free first?
items.a: Absolutely. Sign up and try the core features first, no credit card needed upfront.
Yes. Each clinic's data is fully separated from other clinics, with automatic daily backups.

items.q: My clinic has 3 branches, is that supported?
items.a: Yes. All branches can be monitored from a single account, with reports viewable combined or per branch.

items.q: Do I need to install a special app?
items.a: No need. Just open a browser on your laptop or phone, and you're ready to go.

items.q: What if I get stuck while using it?
items.a: Just chat with our support team on WhatsApp, we usually reply fast.

finalCta.titleAuthenticated: Let's get back to your clinic
finalCta.titleGuest: Go ahead, give it a try. It's free.
finalCta.descAuthenticated: Your dashboard is waiting for you to continue.
finalCta.descGuest: No big commitment needed. Try it for 5 minutes, and continue if it fits.
